response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced and technically skilled Staff Software Engineer with deep expertise in backend systems and open-source development. However, he lacks the executive leadership experience required for a CTO role, specifically in scaling engineering organizations, developing technical leadership layers, and managing board-level communications. Furthermore, his exposure to agentic AI and fintech appears limited to recent individual contributor work, missing the deep, production-level multi-agent architecture and algorithmic finance experience strictly required for this position.
strengths: Extensive hands-on engineering experience across modern backend and distributed systems, including microservices and event-driven architectures.
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain high-throughput platforms, such as handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
concerns: Zero demonstrated executive leadership experience or track record of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ people.
Lacks extensive production experience architecting complex, stateful multi-agent AI systems for high-stakes commercial environments.
No evidence of managing outsourced engineering partners, regulatory compliance infrastructure, or board-level strategic communication.
